name: Episode 1
overview: Badly in debt, a man hesitantly joins a mysterious show and meets seven other eclectic strangers. Their first goal? Figure out the rules.

name: Episode 2
overview: Realizing that an activity rewards them with time, the eight coordinate a plan. But soon, chaos erupts as their strategy doesn't last.

name: Episode 3
overview: A participant approaches 3rd Floor with a proposal to steer the next activity selection. After, a strategic vote takes place to pick the bathroom location.

name: Episode 4
overview: One participant establishes rank on the others, making them desperate. Soon, a new game of dares begins — and a savage hand-to-hand fight ensues.

name: Episode 5
overview: A few floors strategically band together to get an upper hand on the others. But the victims see their salvation in a potential uprising.

name: Episode 6
overview: Now with the tables turned to their favor, the lower floors plan their endgame. However, the clock keeps winding up as strange, brutal events unfold.

name: Episode 7
overview: An act of altruism backfires, putting some participants in danger. But a shocking move changes everything — switching the dynamic up once again.

name: Episode 8
overview: One participant suggests an idea to turn the tides back in their favor. But the show falls into disarray when the result turns out duplicitous.
